languages.text: "Изимонд?" {n}Вам кажется, что Себериан пошатывается.{/n} "Если вы правы, мне ничего не остается, кроме как казнить того, кого я считал одним из самых верных слуг династиии".

traits.locale_text: "Изимонд?" {n}Вам кажется, что Себериан пошатывается.{/n} "Если вы правы, мне ничего не остается, кроме как казнить того, кого я считал одним из самых верных слуг династиии".

languages.text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."
languages.original_text: "Изимонд?" {n}Вам кажется, что Себериан пошатывается.{/n} "Если вы правы, мне ничего не остается, кроме как казнить того, кого я считал одним из самых верных слуг династиии".

traits.locale_text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."
"Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."
"Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."

languages.text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian scheint zurückzuweichen.{/n} "Falls Ihr recht habt, bleibt mir nichts anderes übrig, als jemanden hinzurichten, den ich für einen der treuesten Diener der Dynastie hielt."
languages.original_text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."

traits.locale_text: "Isimond? {n}Seberian scheint zurückzuweichen.{/n} "Falls Ihr recht habt, bleibt mir nichts anderes übrig, als jemanden hinzurichten, den ich für einen der treuesten Diener der Dynastie hielt."

languages.text: “伊西蒙德？”{n}塞贝里安像是猛地后退了一下。{/n}“如果你说得没错，那我别无选择，只能处决这个我一直视为王朝最忠实仆从的人。”
languages.original_text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."

traits.locale_text: “伊西蒙德？”{n}塞贝里安像是猛地后退了一下。{/n}“如果你说得没错，那我别无选择，只能处决这个我一直视为王朝最忠实仆从的人。”

languages.text: « Isimond ? » {n}Seberian semble reculer légèrement.{/n} « Si vous dites vrai, alors je n'ai d'autre choix que d'exécuter une personne que je considérais comme l'un des plus fidèles serviteurs de la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."

traits.locale_text: « Isimond ? » {n}Seberian semble reculer légèrement.{/n} « Si vous dites vrai, alors je n'ai d'autre choix que d'exécuter une personne que je considérais comme l'un des plus fidèles serviteurs de la dynastie. »

languages.text: «¿Isimond?». {n}Seberian se echa para atrás, sorprendido.{/n} «Si lo que dice es cierto, no me queda más remedio que ejecutar a alguien a quien consideraba uno de los siervos más leales de la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."

traits.locale_text: «¿Isimond?». {n}Seberian se echa para atrás, sorprendido.{/n} «Si lo que dice es cierto, no me queda más remedio que ejecutar a alguien a quien consideraba uno de los siervos más leales de la dinastía».

languages.text: "İsimond mu?" {n}Seberian, geriye doğru sendeliyor gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Eğer haklıysan hanedanlığın en sadık hizmetkârlarından biri olarak gördüğüm birini idam etmekten başka yapacak bir şeyim kalmıyor."
languages.original_text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."

traits.locale_text: "İsimond mu?" {n}Seberian, geriye doğru sendeliyor gibi görünüyor.{/n} "Eğer haklıysan hanedanlığın en sadık hizmetkârlarından biri olarak gördüğüm birini idam etmekten başka yapacak bir şeyim kalmıyor."

languages.text: 「イシモンド？」{n}セベリアンは後ずさりしたように見える。{/n}「君が正しいなら、私は王朝に最も忠実な臣下の一人だと考えていた人を処刑するしかない」
languages.original_text: "Isimond?" {n}Seberian seems to lurch back.{/n} "If you are right, there is nothing left for me to do but execute someone I considered one of the dynasty's most loyal servants."

traits.locale_text: 「イシモンド？」{n}セベリアンは後ずさりしたように見える。{/n}「君が正しいなら、私は王朝に最も忠実な臣下の一人だと考えていた人を処刑するしかない」
